SDKs/Packages/ICE/ICECameraMover.cpp.notes: Reviewer flagged Construct's bungee init (mBungeeCarFwd) as a defect, but that is a misattribution of the UpdateHardCuts pattern. Verified against the Construct disasm: it loads TWO distinct vectors -- mpCar+0x20 (zAxis=forward) into one reg and mpCar+0x30 (wAxis=position) into another -- and stores position->mBungeeCarPos(+0x160), forward->mBungeeCarFwd(+0x170). So mBungeeCarPos=GetGeometryPosition()/mBungeeCarFwd=GetForwardVector() is correct. UpdateHardCuts (separately) loads ONLY mpCar+0x30 (position) and stores it to BOTH slots, which the code also does correctly. All 11 funcs semantic-parity verified against asm; compile gate PASS; RED structural parity is the mandated de-optimization (inlined value-type reads -> named GetValueFloat/Int accessors, re-rolled cubic loops). Style clean (no @0x8/X360 in authored comments).
